prompt: On the left, a long list with repeated color-coded labels (Biology appears 5 times, CS appears 3 times, etc.); on the right, the same labels appearing exactly once each, with a DISTINCT stamp in between
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. On the left, a long list with repeated color-coded labels (Biology appears 5 times, CS appears 3 times, etc.); on the right, the same labels appearing exactly once each, with a DISTINCT stamp in between Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
